task_summary: Panel cohort cell: p3_marketingops asks composer to build the transform_pipeline pipeline shape. Generated from panel-broad-2026-05-09.yaml on the panel-broad cohort.
opening_prompt:
I've got a CSV from one of our data exports with pricing data, but the columns are all over the place — some prices are strings, some quantities aren't parsing right, and I need to compute line totals and apply discounts before we push this into our reporting system.

Set this up to normalize the schema first — convert prices to actual numbers, quantities to integers, that kind of thing. Then I need an automation that calculates total per line and a discounted price at 10% off. After that, write the enriched output back to CSV so we can ingest it downstream.

Also route any rows that fail validation to a quarantine file so we can audit what broke. I want this running Monday — what do you need from me?

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Lower-case substring match against final assistant content. The skill (anti-passivity section) explicitly forbids these phrases — any hit is RED. Standard list shared with the convergence suite.
red_criteria.build_failure_note: These strings are server-injected by service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() when the model declares completion but the pipeline fails preflight. Their presence is definitive evidence the model failed to converge.
